entries.commit_message: Adding Threads of Life - an exploration of ephemeral connections
entries.reasoning: In this piece, I aim to explore the delicate nature of human connections amidst turbulent times. By examining various fragments from the internet, I seek to reveal the underlying threads that bind us together and shape our experiences. Through a mixture of visual art and written reflections, I hope to evoke a sense of nostalgia and hopefulness for the resilience of these connections.
